assay: 10x Chromium Single Cell 3' Gene Expression amplified cDNA — baseline Oxford Nanopore direct-ligation simulation

source_docs.title: 10x Chromium Single Cell 3' Gene Expression — protocol PDF

oligos.name: Beads-oligo-dT
oligos.role: Gel-bead-tethered RT primer: capture of poly(A) mRNA and addition of the 10x Barcode, UMI and partial TruSeq Read 1 handle

components.name: Partial TruSeq Read 1
components.role: Read 1 sequencing-primer handle (completed to the full TruSeq Read 1 site during Sample Index PCR)

components.name: 10x Barcode (cell barcode)
components.role: 16 nt cell barcode, identical for all primers on one gel bead (~3,500,000 barcode pool)

components.name: Poly(dT)VN
components.role: 30 nt poly(dT) with VN anchor; primes reverse transcription at the poly(A) tail

oligos.notes: Doc, Protocol Step 1.5 gel bead primers: 5'-CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT-NNNNNNNNNNNNNNNN-NNNNNNNNNNNN-TTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTT-3'. The gel-bead schematic labels the 3' end Poly(dT)VN. The v3 gel bead also carries a Nextera Read 1 (Read 1N) / Capture Sequence 1+2 primer (5'-GTCAGATGTGTATAAGAGACAG-NNNNNNNNNNNNNNNN-NNNNNNNNNNNN-TTGCTAGGACCGGCCTTAAAGC-3'), which is explicitly NOT used for 3' Gene Expression.

oligos.name: Template Switching Oligo (TSO)
oligos.role: Template switching at the cDNA 3' end; adds a constant handle used as the cDNA Reverse primer binding site
oligos.notes: PN-3000228. Written in the document as 5'-AAGCAGTGGTATCAACGCAGAGTACATrGrGrG-3'; the three terminal riboguanosines are transcribed here as GGG.

oligos.name: cDNA Forward primer
oligos.role: Bulk cDNA amplification (PCR), anneals to the partial TruSeq Read 1 handle

oligos.name: cDNA Reverse primer
oligos.role: Bulk cDNA amplification (PCR), anneals to the TSO-derived handle

final_library.source_label: Full-length amplified 10x 3' cDNA (Oxford Nanopore input molecule)
annotation_lines: CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT = R1 handle (partial TruSeq Read 1; 10x bead oligo)
CCCATGTACTCTGCGTTGATACCACTGCTT = reverse complement of the TSO (DERIVED = reverse_complement(TSO)); 3' end

segments.name: cell_barcode
segments.notes: template length 16; observed length may vary (ONT indels)

segments.name: umi
segments.notes: template length 12; observed length may vary (ONT indels)

segments.name: cdna_insert
segments.notes: variable length; no intrinsic protocol maximum (see simulation_profile)

library_generation.title: mRNA capture on the gel-bead poly(dT) primer (GEM formation)
library_generation.note: Inside each GEM the gel bead dissolves and releases the Beads-oligo-dT primer, whose 30 nt poly(dT)VN 3' end anneals to the poly(A) tail of a lysed cell's mRNA. Every primer from one bead carries the same 16 nt 10x Barcode; each individual primer molecule carries its own 12 nt UMI.
library_generation.summary: mRNA is captured on the gel-bead poly(dT) primer as GEMs form.

library_generation.title: Reverse transcription (GEM-RT, 53 C 45 min)
library_generation.note: RT Enzyme C (an MMLV-type reverse transcriptase) extends the primer along the mRNA to make barcoded first-strand cDNA. On reaching the mRNA 5' end it adds a few untemplated cytosines (CCC) to the cDNA 3' end.

library_generation.title: Template Switch Oligo annealing
library_generation.note: The three terminal riboguanosines (rGrGrG) of the Template Switch Oligo base-pair with the untemplated CCC overhang, presenting a new template for the reverse transcriptase.
library_generation.summary: The TSO anneals to the cDNA 3' C-overhang.

library_generation.title: Template switching & transcript extension
library_generation.note: The reverse transcriptase switches template onto the TSO and copies it, appending the TSO complement to the cDNA 3' end. The result is full-length barcoded cDNA flanked by a partial TruSeq Read 1 handle (5') and the TSO handle (3').
library_generation.summary: Template switching extends the transcript with the TSO handle into full-length cDNA.

library_generation.title: cDNA amplification (bulk PCR with cDNA Primers, 11-13 cycles)
library_generation.note: GEMs are broken, cDNA is purified on Dynabeads MyOne SILANE, then amplified in bulk with the cDNA Forward primer (CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT) and cDNA Reverse primer (AAGCAGTGGTATCAACGCAGAG) to build sufficient mass for library construction.
library_generation.summary: Bulk PCR amplifies the full-length cDNA to build mass.

library_generation.title: End repair & dA-tailing (ONT end-prep, NEBNext Ultra II)
library_generation.note: The full-length amplified cDNA is blunted and a single 3' dA overhang is added to each end (shown as the technical token [dA_OVERHANG], not part of the biological sequence). NO fragmentation — the molecule stays full-length.
library_generation.summary: End repair + 3' dA-tailing prepares the amplicon for ligation (no fragmentation).

library_generation.title: ONT ligation-adapter attachment (SQK-LSK114)
library_generation.note: The ONT sequencing adapter — a double-stranded adapter carrying the associated motor protein — is ligated to each dA-tailed end. The motor is a protein component of the adapter, NOT a terminal nucleotide sequence. Exact ONT adapter bases are not represented in this specification. Baseline path: no biotinylated enrichment primers, no streptavidin pull-down.
library_generation.product: [ONT ligation-adapter / motor complex] —— [end-prepped dsDNA: amplified 10x cDNA + dA overhangs] —— [ONT ligation-adapter / motor complex]
library_generation.summary: ONT sequencing adapters (SQK-LSK114) are ligated directly to the full-length cDNA.

library_generation.title: Nanopore sequencing — single-strand read, either orientation
library_generation.note: An ideal full-length read spans one strand of the unfragmented 10x cDNA amplicon. Raw reads enter from either end and may be truncated, may carry only one identifiable 10x terminal flank, or may be fused/chimeric — full-length origin is expected but not guaranteed. No fragmentation, P5/P7 or i7 index.
library_generation.summary: Each molecule is read end-to-end on the flow cell, in either orientation.

library_sequencing.template: one strand of the unfragmented 10x cDNA amplicon; either raw orientation
library_sequencing.note: An ideal full-length read spans one strand of the amplicon. Raw reads enter from either end and may be truncated, missing one terminal flank, or fused/chimeric — not every read spans the whole molecule.
library_sequencing.normalization: Detect the R1-derived (adapter1) and TSO-derived (adapter2) terminal motifs; reverse-complement Orientation B reads to the R1-handle-first representation.
library_sequencing.diagram:
Orientation A: 5'-CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT[CELL_BARCODE:16][UMI:12]TTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTVN[CDNA]CCCATGTACTCTGCGTTGATACCACTGCTT-3'
Orientation B: 5'-[TSO][CDNA_RC][NB][polyA:30][UMI_RC][CELL_BARCODE_RC:16][R1_HANDLE_RC]-3'
               |---------------- one long read (L1) ----------------|

cell_barcode_3M_feb2018.name: 3M-february-2018
cell_barcode_3M_feb2018.source_note: community mirror; no vendor checksum published

docs.title: Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3' v3.1 User Guide
docs.scope: GEM-RT, bead oligo, barcode/UMI, TSO, cDNA amplification, Illumina branch

docs.title: Single-cell transcriptomics from 3' cDNA prepared with 10x (SQK-LSK114, EXP-PCA001)
docs.scope: ENRICHED optional-profile reference (biotinylated-primer + M280 streptavidin pull-down full-length enrichment). NOT the baseline path.

docs.title: epi2me-labs/wf-single-cell
docs.scope: software reference: adapter detection, stranding, fused-read splitting

docs.title: Ligation Sequencing Kit V14 (SQK-LSK114)
docs.scope: baseline direct ligation: end-prep + adapter ligation of full-length cDNA (no enrichment)

docs.title: GoT-Splice (Cell Stem Cell) — sc-Nanopore 10x dataset
docs.scope: biological-template source for simulated cDNA inserts; statistics NOT inherited

molecule_states.title: 10x amplified full-length cDNA (ONT baseline input template)
molecule_states.notes: ONT branch input; canonical adapter1-first amplified-cDNA strand

molecule_states.title: final physical ONT ligation library
molecule_states.annotation: [ONT ligation-adapter/motor complex] + end-prepped dsDNA (amplified 10x cDNA); exact adapter bases not modeled
molecule_states.notes: SQK-LSK114 adapter + motor protein complex; technical bases not represented

molecule_states.title: raw basecalled Nanopore read
molecule_states.annotation: canonical OR reverse-complement; technical flanks often trimmed
molecule_states.notes: one strand translocation; may be full-length, truncated, reverse-oriented, missing one terminal flank, fused/chimeric, or carry residual technical adapter

branches.title: Oxford Nanopore long-read branch (baseline direct ligation)

adapter1.note: R1-derived handle / adapter1 (not the complete TruSeq Read 1 primer)

molecular_terminal_sequence.name: TSO reverse complement
molecular_terminal_sequence.note: the complete molecular 3' terminal handle on the canonical strand

adapter2_motif.note: EPI2ME 3'-kit stranding motif = TSO_RC minus the leading CCC

optional_profiles.title: Full-length enrichment (biotinylated primer + streptavidin pull-down)
optional_profiles.summary: Paper/enrichment-specific variant. Before end-prep it inserts a biotinylated re-amplification PCR with custom ONT primers and an M280 streptavidin pull-down to enrich intact full-length molecules. NOT part of the baseline default spec; implement as a separate profile if needed.

adds_oligos.name: [Btn]Fwd_3580_partial_read1_defined_for_3'_cDNA
adds_oligos.role: biotinylated forward enrichment primer (5' biotin, partial Read 1)

biological_template_source.role: Real sc-Nanopore 10x cDNA reads used ONLY as biological insert templates when the simulator runs with --source-bam; supplies realistic cDNA content.
biological_template_source.caveat: The baseline simulator does NOT reproduce the paper's observed statistics. All artifact rates, orientation balance, truncation and the error model are generic, configurable defaults set at run time — not derived from this dataset.

cdna_length_filter.reason: empirical source-data / runtime filtering, not a chemistry limit

title: sc-Nanopore 10x 3' cDNA (direct ligation)
description: Full-length single-cell 3' cDNA sequenced on Oxford Nanopore. Amplified 10x cDNA (16 nt cell barcode + 12 nt UMI) is taken through ONT end-prep and ligation-adapter attachment and read end-to-end as one long read per molecule. This is a baseline direct-ligation simulation model; it omits the biotin-enrichment / streptavidin pull-down steps of the optimized ONT workflow.

original_publication.title: Single-cell multi-omics defines the cell-type-specific impact of splicing aberrations in human hematopoietic clonal outgrowths

authors.name: Federico Gaiti
authors.affiliation: University Health Network / New York Genome Center

authors.name: Dan A. Landau
authors.affiliation: New York Genome Center / Weill Cornell Medicine

publication.statistical_model: Linear mixed models with sample-aware permutation testing for differential splicing; Wilcoxon rank-sum, likelihood-ratio, and Fisher's exact tests.

other.label: Representative study / data source
other.value: GoT-Splice (Cortes-Lopez et al., 2023) - the sc-Nanopore MDS dataset used as biological template.

other.label: Full-length read yield (paper, enriched protocol)
other.value: 50.4%+/-2.7 -> 77.6%+/-2.0 with biotin enrichment; the baseline direct-ligation model does not reproduce this.
